rationale: In the citing paper, the Toubia et al. paper is cited only in a brief future-research sentence about combining EEG metrics with text-based predictors from movie synopses and narratives. It is not used to build the paper's core theory, hypotheses, measurement strategy, or empirical modeling pipeline. The citation functions as a peripheral example of related box-office prediction work, alongside another grouped reference, rather than as a meaningful input to the present study.
